Based on the context, Simon (then known as John Rossi) wants to run away from the orphanage to escape the harsh treatment he and the other orphans endure. He leads a group of fellow orphans in an attempt to flee this mistreatment. His rebellious nature and self-identification as "Simon Templar" further drive his desire to escape. 

\boxed{\text{Simon wants to run away from the orphanage to escape the harsh treatment he and the other orphans endure.}}
